chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Criminal Bail Application No. D – 01 of 2026 Muhammad Safeer alias Safeer Jageerani vs. The State For the Applicant: Mr. Riaz Ahmed Arbani, Advocate Date of hearing: 05.01.2026 Date of announcement: 05.01.2026 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. Urgency granted. Deferred. Learned counsel undertakes to place on record certified copies, true translations etc. during the course of the week; application disposed of in terms herein. The applicant seeks protective bail, in respect of F.I.R. No.12 of 2025, registered on 29.09.2025 before P.S. Kacho Bindi-I, District Ghotki, pertaining to offences under Sections 365-A, 216-A, P.P.C. read with Section 7 of Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997. 2. Learned counsel submits that the applicant has been erroneously nominated in the aforementioned case and is intent upon surrendering to the trial Court, however, in order to be enabled in such regard seeks to be admitted to protective bail. 3. In view of the foregoing, and without adverting to the merits of the case1, the applicant is admitted to protective bail from the date hereof till end of Court hours on 14.01.2025 or upon surrender of the applicant before the trial Court, whichever is earlier, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees thirty thousand only) and a personal recognizance bond, in the like amount, to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. 4. This Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE 1 Mukhtar Awan vs. The State reported as 1990 PCrLJ 617; Sabir Hussain vs. The State reported as 1999 MLD 2208.
